ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the organization belongs to */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (very small, small, medium, large) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization's details were last updated */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the organization belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the organization's website */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the organization */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the expenditure belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Expenditure amount */,
  "reporting_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of organizations reporting expenditure data */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the expenditure */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the expenditure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expenditure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expenditure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (very small, small, medium, large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "min_employees" INTEGER /* Minimum number of employees for the size category */,
  "max_employees" INTEGER /* Maximum number of employees for the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_sizes" (
  "org_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization size record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "num_organizations" INTEGER /* Number of organizations in the size category */,
  "amount" REAL /* Expenditure amount for the size category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year for which the data is recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization size record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization size record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_sizes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, stakeholder) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
